phase: Phase 16C P1 — stable gate ledger (initial; updated as P2-P10 complete)
no_tag_fallback: no tag if no material progress
fail_closed_rule: v3.8.0 stable is allowed only if every required-for-stable gate is PASS on the post-merge main SHA. Unknown / partial / not-tested / local-only / tool-unavailable / branch-only blocks stable.

summary.rationale: Phase 16C inherits two open blockers from Phase 16B (g01 Docker FAIL_NOT_VERIFIED and g05 Bandit PARTIAL). P2 attempts to close g05; P3 attempts to close g01. If both close and all other gates remain PASS through P4-P10, v3.8.0 stable is justifiable. If either remains blocked, the fail-closed outcome is v3.7.7-stable-gate-alpha prerelease (or no tag if no material progress).
